meaning: n.灰姑娘("水晶鞋与玫瑰花"中的女主人公)
examples: It's all come down to this—a Cinderella story.
His daily life was just like in a Cinderella story.
Like a Cinderella story, it all took off from there.
For some, this will be a modern-day interpretation of the Cinderella story, unfolding in reality.
However, the clock has yet to strike midnight for one Cinderella team, Wichita State.
